name: Banana-Crunch Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Beat the mashed bananas, sugar, and eggs together until light in consistency.
3. Stir in the milk.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder) and mix thoroughly.
5. Stir in the melted butter, vanilla extract, and chopped nuts (if using).
6. Pour the batter into a standard or two smaller baking pans.
7. Bake for one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
- Baking time may need to be reduced if using smaller pans.
8. Allow the bread to cool thoroughly before slicing.
9. This recipe freezes well.
